Flow.description: Creates Contacts and Organization in the FIMBY Portal
Flow.label: New FIMBY Connection

fields.name: WarningMsg
fields.fieldText: New Contacts must have a First Name, Last Name, Postal Code, and you have received their permission to add them to FIMBY.

fields.name: HouseholdWarning
fields.fieldText: New Household Members must have an email address.

fields.name: This_person_is_a_member_of_my_household_and_we_will_share_a_login
fields.fieldText: This person is a member of my household and we will share a login:

fields.name: have_the_permission_of_the_contact_who_s_info_you_are_adding_to
fields.fieldText: I have permission from this person to add them to the FIMBY database.

validationRule.errorMessage: You must have the individual's permission to add them to the database.

fields.name: yourcontact
fields.fieldText:
Contgratulations!!

You created a new contact.


{!Alive}

fields.name: yourcontact_0
fields.fieldText:
Contgratulations!!

You created a new organization.


{!Alive}

fields.name: WhattoCreate
fields.fieldText: Please select the type of connection you'd like to create.

fields.name: Household_member_creating_the_new_contact
fields.fieldText: Household member creating the new contact?
